steps.title: Use list evaluation
steps.content: All four choices use $x=1$, $x=2$, and $x=3$, so evaluate the function at those three inputs.

steps.title: Read the output row
steps.content: Evaluate the three inputs in order. The output row is $[-2,1,6]$: $$h(1)=-2,\quad h(2)=1,\quad h(3)=6$$

steps.title: Match the table
steps.content: The table with output row $-2,1,6$ is choice B.
